name: Chocolate Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your bread machine to the basic baking cycle.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the yeast and warm milk until the yeast is activated.
3. Add the sugar, cocoa, egg, butter, and vanilla extract to the yeast mixture.
4. Pour the flour into the bread machine's mixing bowl in one layer.
5. Close the lid of the bread machine and start the knead cycle.
6. Once the cycle is complete, remove the dough from the machine and spread it onto two greased loaf pans.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Enjoy your freshly baked Chocolate Bread!
